queries.question: Provide a list of all documentary series and also provide a list of mini-series that have 10 episodes.
queries.sql:
SELECT TVShows.Title 
FROM TVShows JOIN EpisodeCounts ON TVShows.Id = EpisodeCounts.Show_ID
WHERE TVShows.Type = "Documentary Series" OR TVShows.Type = "Mini-Series" AND EpisodeCounts.Number_of_Episodes = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?tvshows a :Tv_Show .
  ?episodecounts a :EpisodeCounts .
  ?episodecounts p:hasTVShows ?tvshows .
  ?tvshows p:Title ?title .
  ?tvshows p:Type ?type_w .
  ?tvshows p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?episodecounts p:Number_of_Episodes ?number_of_episodes_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary Series" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Mini-Series" && (STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "10" || STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "10.0"))))
}

queries.question: Which documentary series have 10 episodes and which mini-series have the same number of episodes?
queries.sql:
SELECT TVShows.Title 
FROM TVShows JOIN EpisodeCounts ON TVShows.Id = EpisodeCounts.Show_ID
WHERE (TVShows.Type = "Documentary Series" OR TVShows.Type = "Mini-Series") AND EpisodeCounts.Number_of_Episodes = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?tvshows a :Tv_Show .
  ?episodecounts a :EpisodeCounts .
  ?episodecounts p:hasTVShows ?tvshows .
  ?tvshows p:Title ?title .
  ?tvshows p:Type ?type_w .
  ?tvshows p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?episodecounts p:Number_of_Episodes ?number_of_episodes_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary Series" || STR(?type_w2) = "Mini-Series")) && (STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "10" || STR(?number_of_episodes_w) = "10.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me documentaries and mini-series that have 10 episodes.
